_comment: Merge these entries into the mcpServers block of ~/.claude.json (or use `claude mcp add`). Paths assume the locations created by install.sh; install.sh writes a resolved copy to setup/mcp.servers.resolved.json (HOME + email substituted). 'asta' is Ai2's official Semantic Scholar MCP (Asta Scientific Corpus Tool) — REMOTE, nothing to install. Request a free API key at https://allenai.org/asta/resources/mcp and `export ASTA_API_KEY=...` (Claude Code expands ${ASTA_API_KEY}). Asta use is subject to Ai2's License Agreement (https://allenai.org/asta-corpus-license) + Terms of Use (https://allenai.org/terms); Semantic Scholar data is ODC-BY (attribute Semantic Scholar, do not redistribute the raw data).
